issues.sample: PURCHASED A NEW SUBARU LEGACY FEB. 28, 2018.  AFTER ONLY 70 MILES THE WARNING LIGHT FOR SEAT BELTS AND AIRBAG MALFUNCTION APPEARED ON A STARLINK SYSTEM AND DASH.  AFTER IMMEDIATELY TAKING IT IN AT THE LOCAL CAR DEALER, SERVICE AGENTS CLAIMED THAT A "RODENT" HAS CAUSED THE DAMAGE.

narrative.headline: 2018 Subaru Legacy: electrical system tops the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 113 complaints with NHTSA. The electrical system is the most reported area at 33%, followed by visibility/wiper issues (21%) and the engine (9%). No injuries or deaths are reported across any area. The engine and fuel/propulsion complaints are fewer but account for the crashes (3 and 2), so they are worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.sample: PURCHASED A NEW SUBARU LEGACY FEB. 28, 2018.  AFTER ONLY 70 MILES THE WARNING LIGHT FOR SEAT BELTS AND AIRBAG MALFUNCTION APPEARED ON A STARLINK SYSTEM AND DASH.  AFTER IMMEDIATELY TAKING IT IN AT THE LOCAL CAR DEALER, SERVICE AGENTS CLAIMED THAT A "RODENT" HAS CAUSED THE DAMAGE.
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint: 37 reports (33%), including 1 with fire. No crashes or injuries reported. Watch for warning lights on the dash and infotainment system.

issues.sample: THE DRIVERS SIDE MIRROR OF 2018/2019 LEGACY'S WITH BLIND SPOT DETECTION WILL NOT ADJUST OUT FAR ENOUGH TO SEE BLIND SPOT OF VEHICLE FOR SEAT POSITION ADJUSTED FOR AVERAGE TO TALL DRIVERS. WHILE THE MIRROR DETECTION LIGHT WORKS THERE IS NO WAY TO PHYSICALLY CONFIRM SIDE TRAFFIC PO
issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 24 reports (21%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Check the mirrors and blind-spot visibility during a test drive.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 10 reports (9%), tied to 3 crashes and no injuries. Watch for the car stalling or losing power while driving.

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: 8 reports (7%), linked to 2 crashes and no injuries. Some owners report the car stalling unexpectedly.

issues.title: Visibility
issues.blurb: 8 reports (7%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Some owners report windshield cracks appearing without impact.
